titleStmt.title: SII 24.545: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 545. (A.R. No. 109 of 1937-38.) V PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL OF THE GARUḌA-MAṆḌAPA.

summary.p: Registers a gift of the village Iraṇyamaṅgalam (Hiraṇyamaṅgalam) by Viśvanātha-nāyaka, Chokkanātha-nāyaka, left in charge of Nārāyaṇaṉ, son of Kṛishṇayyaṅgār of Śrēshṭalūr for offerings, etc., to the god on the 6th day of the Bhūpati Uḍaiyār festival, when the god was taken to the sixteen pillared maṇḍapa in the garden to the west of the 1000-pillared maṇḍapa and on similar occasions. The details of the date viz., Śaka 1558, Prabhava, Makara śu. 5, Wednesday, Punarpūśam are irregular. śu. 5 and Punarpūsam cannot combine in the month of Makara. Makara śu. 5 of the specified year however, corresponded to 1667 A.D., January.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī . śakābdam 1000 5 100 8 10 8 Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa parāpavaṉāma samva
scarattu makaraṉāyattu pūṟuvapakṣattu pañcamiyum putavāramum petta puṇarpūcanakṣattirattu
ṉāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭiyakulaācaṉivaḷaṉāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti vaḷaṉāṭṭut tiruvaraṅka
m tiruppatiperumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar śrīpaṇṭārattukku Aṭiyen kavucika gotra
ttu Ābastampasūtrattu yajuśākādhyāyarāṉa śreṣṭalūr kriṣṇayaṅkār putraṉ ṉāṟaṇa
yaneṉ teṇṭaṉ samaṟpittup poliyūṭṭu cilācāsanam paṇṇikkoṭuttapaṭi Āyirakkāl
ttirumaṇṭapattukku melpiṟam tirunantavaṉattil Aṭiyeṉuṭa Upaiyam patiṉāṟukāl maṇṭapattil
ppūpatiyuṭaiyar tiruṉāḷ Āṟāntiruṉāḷaikku Eḻuntaruḷukaiyyil tirukkuttumaṇi viḷakkukkum tiruvan
tikkāppukkum neypaṭi 3 kku pu 3 tiṟttatukku Elam palam 2kku pu(1/2) Amutu ceytaruḷum poṉakam
kū4cemakka 2 Āka kū 6kku pu 8 poriyamutu 2 100kku poṉ3u 4 tocai 2 100kku poṉ 2 pu (1/2) va
ṭai 2 100- kku poṉ 2u 8 Atiracam 2 100- kku poṉ 5u 6 vecca kūṉ 2 10kku poṉ 2 pāṉakam kūṉ 2 10 pon_ 2 ciṟappuppa
takkuppaṭi campā poṉ 4kku poṉ10 2 paṭaikka neypaṭi 2kku pu2 paruppu kku pu6 kaṟiamutu vāḻaikkā
y 5 100- kkupu4 palākkāy 5- kku U- 2 kattarikkāy 1000 5kku U 2¥ pākalkāy 2pakku U 2¥ veḷḷarikkā
y 2ṟ-kkuu 1 Uppu puḷi miḷaku palacampāram vellam vilai pu4 tirumpa parimāṟa neypaṭi 1¢ kku pu1¢
Iḷanir 2 100- kku U 6 karumpu 2 100 kkuu 6 teṅkāy 100- kku U 5 vāḻaippaḻam 5 100- kku U- 5 palāppaḻam 5kkuu 2 cantaṉappaṭi U- kku U
3 pākku palam 4 10kkum Ilaiyamutu 5 100kku U 4 cāttiyaruḷattirumālai cukantavilai U 2 pāvāṭai parivaṭṭam ti
rumuṉ kāṇikkai U- 5 maṇṭapam kāvaṇam poṭa Āḷ kūli U- 5 karuvulam cemakku cumaikūli U 1 pantakkut
takaikku(n) ney(p)paṭi 2 10 2- kku poṉ 2u 2 kuṭai nittiyam pantam piṭi kūli Āḷ ti
ruṉāḷ Āṟāntiruṉāḷaikku poṉ 4 10 5 Inta vakaippaṭikku Ātibrahmāviṉ tiruṉāḷ viṭāmāttiRead ‘viṭāyāṟṟi’kaṭṭiḷaikku poṉ
4 10 5 tirumalaiṉāyakkarayyaṉ tiruṉāḷ muṇāntiruṉāḷaikku poṉ 4 10 5 Āka maṇṭapam 3kku poṉ 100 3 10 5 muṉṟu maṇṭapatti
l cattāparaṇa kaṭṭiḷaikku Upaiyam Amutuceytaruḷum teṅkāyyappam Ari vāṇam 2- kku vaṭai10 5 Uppu Arivāṇam
kku vaṭaiparuppu paṭi 6- kku U 1¥ teṅkāy 2 10 5- kku U 1 vāḻaippaḻam 100 2 10 5kku U 10 2 paṭaikka caṟkarai sa U¥ pāṉakam kūṉ 2- kku U
2 Iḷanir 5 10kku U 1¥ Āka Upaiyam 1- kku U 8 tiruṉāḷ 8- kku Upaiyam 8- kku poṉ 6 U-� Āka maṇṭapakkaṭṭaḷai pāṇam
poṉ kku 100 4 10 1u 4- yaṭai Aṟaic ceṅkaṭṭil ṉācciyār makānavamikkaṭṭaḷaikku Amutu ceytaruḷum poṅkal kūṉ-1
kku poṉ 1u 2 Appam [5 10] kku U 5 tocai 5 10kku U 7¢ vaṭai 5 10-kkuu 7 navatāṉiyam 2pakkuu 2
5- kku poṉ 5 10 4 U 7¥ 2 100m Aṭiyeṉum Aṟaikkaṭṭaḷaiyil cāttiyaruḷukiṟa cantaṇam tirupparivaṭṭa
tiruveṅkaṭaṉāta cuvāmikoyil tiruvārātaṉatukku poṉ 100 2 10 Āka poṉ 2 100 Ākavakai 2- kku poṉ 4 100 Intappo
ṉ ṉāṉūttukku poliyūṭṭu viṭṭatu viśvaṉāta ṉāyakkar cokkaṉāta ṉāyakkarayyaṉ kaiyyil tārāpūṟu
vamāka vāṅki samaṟppittu teṉkarai melmukam Iraṇiyamṅkalam nañcai puñcai nattam cetta
laittiṭal cakala Ātāyamum kiṟāmam 1- kku poṉ 4 100 Intappoṉ ṉāṉūt
tukku maṇṭapappaṭikku cuntarapāṇṭikkaṭṭiḷaikku makānavami kaṭṭiḷai
kkum tiruveṅkiṭanātacuvāmi paṭittiratu kku kovil śrī paṇṭārattu kku poṉ
2 100- kku kiṟāmam pātiyum śreṣṭalūr ceṇṭalaṅkār rākavayyaṅkār p
pārcamāka Aṭiyeṉ Aṟaikaṭṭiḷai cāttuppaṭi tirupparivaṭṭam tiruveṅka
ṭaṉātasvāmi tiruvārātaṉattu kku poṉ 2 100- kku (.) kiṟāmam patiyumākap poli yūṭṭu cilā
cāsanam paṇṇik koṭutteṉ perumāḷ śrīraṅganādhadevar śrī
paṇṭārattukku Aṭiyeṉ śreṣṭalūr (.) ṉāṟaṇayyaṉeṉ . Inta cilāśā
sanam Eḻutiṉa naṉmai kku kkoyilkkaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyaṉ
Eḻuttu Itukkuṇṭāṉa viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu śreṣṭalūr ceṇṭal[ kan] rā
kavayyaṅkār peṟakkaṭavarākavum §
ttil Ātibrahmāviṉ tiruṉāḷ viṭāyāc ci
ḷāka Ellai karaikku Eḻuntaruḷukaiyil rekuṉāta maṇṭapattu
kku vuṭalāka Aṭiyeṉ Upaiyam ṉālukāl maṇṭapattil tiruṉāḷ Oṉṟu
kku Eṟiyaruḷi Amutu ceytaruḷum ṉā 4 100 kku poṉ 1pu4 vaṭai 100kku poṉ 1pu4 cempā
kūṉ 2kku poṉ 10pu-iḷanīr 5 10kku pu1 pākkupalam 4 10kku Ilaiyamutu 5 100- kku pu4
cantaṇam palam 10 kku pu 3 pāvāṭai parivaṭṭam tirumuṉkāṇikkai pu 4
tiruṉāḷ Oṇṇukku poṉ 5pu ¢ Āka tiruṉāḷ Eṭṭukku poṉ 45 Inta
cilācāsanam Eḻutiṉamaikku koyilkaṇakku śrīraṅka
ṉāṟāyaṇapriyan Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 24.545 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
